CREATE TABLE keys (key_id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_name VARCHAR(255), key_value VARCHAR(255), key_type VARCHAR(50), key_format VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO keys (key_name, key_value, key_type, key_format) VALUES ('wss.pfx', 'sample_key_value', 'X.509', 'PKCS12');
INSERT INTO keys (key_name, key_value, key_type, key_format) VALUES ('dsa.der', NULL, 'DSA', 'DER');
SELECT key_name FROM keys WHERE key_type = 'X.509';
SELECT key_name FROM keys WHERE key_type IN ('3DES', 'DSA');
SELECT k1.key_name FROM keys k1 JOIN keys k2 ON k1.key_type = k2.key_type WHERE k1.key_id != k2.key_id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM keys WHERE key_format = 'DER';
INSERT INTO keys (key_name, key_value, key_type, key_format) VALUES ('sample_key', 'value123', 'Symmetric', 'RAW');
SELECT * FROM keys WHERE key_name LIKE 'test%';
